data.title: 国际服课程表新增区域「the Millennium Study Center」

data.body:
[New Lesson Area]

Sensei, did you see that a new area, the Millennium Study Center, was added to Lessons during the 1/25 update?
Make sure to check it out if you need growth materials for Millennium students!

#BlueArchive
